basic_details.job_title: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand IT Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 29 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand (MCDHJ) IT Executive Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand. A total of 29 vacancies have been announced through the MCDHJ IT Executive Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: General: 40 years, EWS: 40 years, OBC: 42 years, Female Unreserved: 43 years, ST/SC: 45 years. PH Category: 45-50 years.
age_limit.details: General/EWS: 40 years OBC (BC-I & BC-II): 42 years Female Unreserved: 43 years ST/SC: 45 years Age relaxation of 5 years for PH category.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Computer Science/IT/ECE/EEE), M.C.A., M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT), 5 years post qualification experience in IT/Software Development/IT System, 2 years experience as project manager
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: BE/B.Tech (Computer Science/IT/ECE/EEE) / M.C.A. / M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT). Experience: Post qualification 5 years experience in IT/Software Development/IT System and worked as a project manager for 2 years. Skills: Project Management/Project Delivery, good team leader skills, deep knowledge of programming skills like JAVA, .NET etc. Knowledge of Testing tools, SDLC, STQC, Hardware Software, Networking, Data Centre etc.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
